examples_json: [{"en":"I'll have a latte, please.","zh":"我要一杯拿铁。"}]
[{"en":"A cappuccino with extra foam, please.","zh":"一杯卡布奇诺，多加奶泡。"}]
[{"en":"I'd like a double espresso.","zh":"我要一杯双份浓缩咖啡。"}]
[{"en":"Is this for here or take away?","zh":"在这喝还是外带？"}]
[{"en":"For here, please.","zh":"在这喝。"}]
[{"en":"Can I see the menu?","zh":"我能看看菜单吗？"}]
[{"en":"Are you ready to order?","zh":"您准备好点餐了吗？"}]
[{"en":"Here's your receipt.","zh":"这是你的收据。"}]
[{"en":"It's common to leave a tip at cafes.","zh":"在咖啡店给小费很常见。"}]
[{"en":"Can I get a straw, please?","zh":"能给我一根吸管吗？"}]
[{"en":"What size would you like?","zh":"您要什么尺寸的？"}]
[{"en":"I'll take a regular size.","zh":"我要中杯。"}]
[{"en":"A large coffee costs extra.","zh":"大杯咖啡要加钱。"}]
[{"en":"Can I get an extra shot in my latte?","zh":"我的拿铁能加一份浓缩吗？"}]
[{"en":"Do you have oat milk?","zh":"你们有燕麦奶吗？"}]
[{"en":"Get a stamp on your loyalty card.","zh":"在你的会员卡上盖个章。"}]
[{"en":"The barista made a beautiful latte art.","zh":"咖啡师做了漂亮的拉花。"}]
[{"en":"Is the refill free?","zh":"续杯免费吗？"}]
[{"en":"I prefer iced coffee in summer.","zh":"夏天我更喜欢冰咖啡。"}]
[{"en":"A hot chocolate with whipped cream, please.","zh":"一杯热巧克力加奶油。"}]
[{"en":"Can I add some cream?","zh":"能加一些奶油吗？"}]
